name: Appraise
description: Use this skill to tell an antique from old junk, a sword that's old and fancy from an elven heirloom, and high-quality jewelry from cheap stuff made to look good.

name: Balance
description: Use this skill to keep your footing on narrow surfaces, uneven ground, or precarious surfaces.

name: Bluff
description: Use this skill to deceive, trick, or mislead others.

name: Climb
description: Use this skill to scale walls, cliffs, and other steep slopes.

name: Concentration
description: Use this skill to cast spells in difficult circumstances or maintain concentration.

name: Craft
description: Use this skill to make items using raw materials, such as armor, weapons, or other goods.

name: Decipher Script
description: Use this skill to piece together the meaning of ancient runes, interpret an unfamiliar language, or read an encoded message.

name: Diplomacy
description: Use this skill to negotiate, calm situations, or change attitudes.

name: Disable Device
description: Use this skill to disarm traps or sabotage mechanical devices.

name: Disguise
description: Use this skill to change your appearance or that of another person.

name: Escape Artist
description: Use this skill to slip bonds, wriggle through tight spaces, or escape from grapples.

name: Forgery
description: Use this skill to create a fake document or detect a forged one.

name: Gather Information
description: Use this skill to pick up rumors, locate items or people, or get general information about a topic.

name: Handle Animal
description: Use this skill to drive a team of horses, teach a dog tricks, or train a griffon to bear a rider.

name: Heal
description: Use this skill to tend to wounds, treat diseases, or care for poisoned characters.

name: Hide
description: Use this skill to conceal yourself from enemies, slink past guards, or tail someone.

name: Intimidate
description: Use this skill to frighten or coerce others.

name: Jump
description: Use this skill to leap over pits, jump down from heights, or vault obstacles.

name: Knowledge (Arcana)
description: Use this skill to recall information about ancient mysteries, magic traditions, arcane symbols, cryptic phrases, constructs, dragons, and magical beasts.

name: Knowledge (Architecture and Engineering)
description: Use this skill to recall information about buildings, aqueducts, bridges, and fortifications.

name: Knowledge (Dungeoneering)
description: Use this skill to recall information about aberrations, caverns, oozes, and spelunking.

name: Knowledge (Geography)
description: Use this skill to recall information about lands, terrain, climate, and people.

name: Knowledge (History)
description: Use this skill to recall information about royalty, wars, colonies, migrations, and founding of cities.

name: Knowledge (Local)
description: Use this skill to recall information about legends, personalities, inhabitants, laws, customs, traditions, and humanoids.

name: Knowledge (Nature)
description: Use this skill to recall information about animals, fey, giants, monstrous humanoids, plants, seasons and cycles, weather, and vermin.

name: Knowledge (Nobility and Royalty)
description: Use this skill to recall information about lineages, heraldry, family trees, mottoes, and personalities.

name: Knowledge (Religion)
description: Use this skill to recall information about deities, ecclesiastical tradition, holy symbols, and undead.

name: Knowledge (The Planes)
description: Use this skill to recall information about the Inner Planes, the Outer Planes, the Astral Plane, the Ethereal Plane, outsiders, elementals, and magic related to the planes.

name: Listen
description: Use this skill to hear approaching enemies, detect someone sneaking up on you, or eavesdrop.

name: Move Silently
description: Use this skill to sneak up on someone or move quietly past guards.

name: Open Lock
description: Use this skill to pick locks.

name: Perform
description: Use this skill to sing, dance, play an instrument, or put on any kind of performance.

name: Profession
description: Use this skill to earn a living in a trade or professional role, such as cook, miner, or sailor.

name: Ride
description: Use this skill to control a mount in combat, ride bareback, or stay mounted when your horse rears.

name: Search
description: Use this skill to find secret doors, traps, hidden compartments, or other details.

name: Sense Motive
description: Use this skill to detect lies, predict someone's next action, or get a hunch about a social situation.

name: Sleight of Hand
description: Use this skill to pick pockets, palm objects, or perform other acts of legerdemain.

name: Speak Language
description: Use this skill to learn to speak and understand additional languages.

name: Spellcraft
description: Use this skill to identify spells, magic items, or magical effects.

name: Spot
description: Use this skill to notice details, detect hidden creatures, or see things at a distance.

name: Survival
description: Use this skill to track creatures, hunt for food, avoid natural hazards, or predict the weather.

name: Swim
description: Use this skill to move through water or other liquids.

name: Tumble
description: Use this skill to dive, roll, somersault, flip, and move through threatened squares.

name: Use Magic Device
description: Use this skill to activate magic items, including wands, scrolls, and other devices.

name: Use Rope
description: Use this skill to tie knots, bind prisoners, or splice rope together.
